Hero.badge: 🟢 Registration is Now Open — Limited Seats Available
Hero.title: Tahsili Intensive Program… Fast-Track a Full Year of Prep in Just One Month and Secure Your Dream Major
Hero.description: An intensive preparation program that fully covers all Tahsili scientific subjects, combining fast-solving techniques, realistic mock exams, and a dedicated personal mentor guiding you every step of the way.

Statistics.title: Numbers That Reflect Our Students’ Results

Problems.Title: The Problem: You Study Hard but See No Results? Worried About the Tahsili Exam?
Problems.subTitle: Many students put in long hours of study… but their results don’t reflect their effort because:
items: The syllabus is overwhelming and you don’t know where to start
You study hard but without a clear strategy
Fear of missing your university admission distracts your focus
Test anxiety affects your actual performance

Solutions.Title: The Solution: A Results-Driven Program
Solutions.subTitle: We designed this program as a complete system to help you boost your Tahsili score through:
items: A clear day-by-day study plan with a dedicated personal mentor
Live sessions with subject-matter experts who answer your questions instantly
Fast-solving techniques to help you tackle even the toughest questions with confidence
Realistic mock exams that eliminate test anxiety before the big day

Curriculum.title: What You’ll Master in the Tahsili Prep Program
Curriculum.description: A focused, high-impact review targeting the most frequently tested concepts—no fluff, no unnecessary theory.

items.title: Mathematics
items.description: A comprehensive review of core concepts and the most frequently tested problem types in the Tahsili exam.

items.title: Physics
items.description: Key formulas and applications that commonly appear in the exam, with fast-solving strategies.

items.title: Chemistry
items.description: Essential equations, reactions, and core concepts explained in a way that helps you solve questions in seconds.

items.title: Biology
items.description: High-frequency topics and how to accurately extract the correct answers from questions.

items.title: Time Management & Test Strategy
items.description: A complete timing strategy for the exam and how to avoid common traps that cost you marks.

items.title: Realistic Qiyas-Style Mock Exams
items.description: Full-length practice tests that simulate the real exam interface and pressure, so test day feels familiar.

Journey.title: A Personal Mentor Guiding You Every Step of the Way
Journey.description: From day one, you’ll be connected with a dedicated academic mentor who assesses your current level, builds a personalized study plan tailored to your schedule and goals, and tracks your progress weekly to ensure you stay on the right path.
steps: An initial assessment session to accurately evaluate your English level
A personalized study plan based on your schedule and target score
Weekly follow-ups to track and improve your performance
Continuous support all the way to your exam day

Features.title: Why Students Choose Elm Way Program?

items.title: STEP-Specialized Instructors
items.subtitle: Each instructor has over 5 years of experience training students for STEP and similar proficiency exams.

items.title: Full Session Recordings
items.subtitle: Missed a session or want to review? Everything is recorded and available on the platform 24/7.

items.title: Personalized Follow-Up
items.subtitle: We continuously track your progress and focus specifically on your weak areas—you’re never left on your own.

items.title: Real Exam Simulation
items.subtitle: Practice tests that match the real exam in format, content, and timing—so there are no surprises on test day.

items.title: Flexible Payment Options
items.subtitle: Easy and convenient payment through Tamara or Tabby.

items.title: Free Retake Guarantee
items.subtitle: If you complete the program and don’t achieve the desired improvement, you can retake the course for free.

items.q: Does the course guarantee a specific STEP score?
items.a: The course is based on a proven methodology that has delivered real results, with improvement rates exceeding 80% for past trainees. Your results depend on your attendance, engagement, and practice.

items.q: Is the course online or in-person?
items.a: Fully online… live interactive sessions with specialized instructors. All sessions are recorded and available on the platform for review.

items.q: I’m a beginner or intermediate level. Is this course suitable for me?
items.a: Yes. The course starts from the basics and gradually builds up. It’s designed to suit all levels and help every trainee achieve their best possible results.

items.q: I’ve taken the test before and got a low score. Will this course help me?
items.a: Absolutely. Many of our trainees joined after unsatisfactory attempts and achieved significant improvement. We precisely diagnose your weaknesses and work on them intensively.

items.q: What if I miss a session?
items.a: All sessions are recorded and available on the platform, so you can catch up at a time that suits you.

items.q: Can I access the content after the course ends?
items.a: Yes, all digital content and session recordings remain available on the platform, so you can revisit them anytime you need.

SuccessStory.title: Our Students' Success Stories
SuccessStory.subtitle: Many of our students have improved their aptitude test scores by over 80% after joining the program.

LeadForm.title: Register Now and Start Your Journey to a Higher STEP Score
LeadForm.subtitle: Fill in your details and our team will contact you within 24 hours to build your study plan.

form.footer: 🔒 Your information is secure and will not be shared with any third party.

fields.submit: Reserve Your Spot and We’ll Get in Touch

Footer.description: Elm Way is a Saudi virtual academy dedicated to helping students and professionals achieve their career goals through specialized training programs and high-quality educational content. The academy provides flexible and accessible learning solutions designed to prepare learners for professional exams and equip them with the knowledge, skills, and confidence needed for career success using modern e-learning technologies.
